meta.topic: Sjukanmälningsgrundande inkomst (SGI) — basis for parental allowance, sickness cash benefits, etc.
meta.disclaimer: Illustrative summary for planning in the app. Official assessment is made by Försäkringskassan; eligibility, reference months, and protection periods have detailed legal conditions.

annualisation.summary: Income that counts toward SGI is taken from qualifying employment income over a reference period. A common pattern is: sum the income for the last full months of qualifying employment, divide by the number of those months, then multiply by 12 to express an annual SGI figure.
annualisation.example_typical_six_months: If the sum of qualifying employment income from the last six full months is S, then annual SGI corresponds to (S / 6) * 12.

protection.summary: Under certain conditions your SGI level is protected (not lowered) when you have no or lower pay from work — for example during leave, holiday, unemployment or certain self-employment phases. Exact rules and duration differ by situation.
modes_mentioned: first year qualifying as self-employed under specific rules

period_types_for_modeling_in_app.notes: Vacation while still employed is commonly modeled as employed; self_employed may use metadata for first-year flags. The app does not automatically decide legal protection — periods are for illustration and projection only.
